slides.headline: The Quantum Leap in Compute Power
slides.context: Traditional silicon limits are reaching their breaking point, necessitating a radical shift in processing architecture.
slides.update: Quantum computing breakthroughs promise exponential speed increases, moving beyond binary limitations.
slides.impact: This heralds an era of solving previously intractable problems in medicine, materials science, and AI.
slides.narration_transcript: The next frontier of computing isn't faster silicon; it's fundamentally different physics. Quantum computing promises to unlock computational power previously confined to theory.
